things.name: Rijksmuseum
things.description: Netherlands' national museum housing Rembrandt's Night Watch and Vermeer masterpieces

things.name: Anne Frank House
things.description: Secret annex where Anne Frank wrote her diary during the Nazi occupation

things.name: Van Gogh Museum
things.description: World's largest collection of Van Gogh paintings, drawings and letters

things.name: Canal Ring
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century canal belt with over 1,500 historic bridges

things.name: Heineken Experience
things.description: Interactive tour of the original Heineken brewery with tastings

things.name: Vondelpark
things.description: Beloved city park with open-air theatre, cafes and events in the summer

things.name: Stedelijk Museum
things.description: Leading museum of modern and contemporary art and design

things.name: NEMO Science Museum
things.description: Hands-on science museum in a stunning ship-shaped building by Renzo Piano

things.name: Jordaan District
things.description: Bohemian neighbourhood of narrow canals, galleries, markets and independent cafes

things.name: Royal Palace Amsterdam
things.description: 17th-century masterpiece of Dutch classicism on Dam Square
